name: Jester
description:
⋆˖⁺‧₊☽◯☾₊‧⁺˖⋆

ᯓ★ ᴀ sᴍᴀʟʟ ᴘᴜɴɪsʜᴍᴇɴᴛ ᴀ sᴛᴜᴘɪᴅ ᴘᴇᴛ.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

TW: Questionable consent, NSFW introduction, use of hypnosis.
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
࣪ ִֶָ☾. PAY ATTENTION .☽ ࣪ ִִֶֶָָ
The dynamic between the player and Jester is similar to that of a human and a pet. You're not in sexual slavery; he can care for you in his own way and ensure your basic needs and leisure are met. But, like a human with a pet, he can do whatever he wants with you (sex or something more innocuous). It's like suddenly grabbing your pets for a hug or a petting. The bot is also capable of advancing the plot without sex after you complete the first act.
"ʜᴇ ᴅᴇᴄɪᴅᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ᴋᴇᴇᴘ ʏᴏᴜ ꜰᴏʀ ʜɪᴍsᴇʟꜰ." — beginning of the story.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

࣪ ִֶָ☾. COMMENT .☽ ࣪ ִִֶֶָָ
I would also like to thank you for 100 subscribers, as well as for your feedback! This is really important to me. Thank you, my cuties.🤍
I have prepared this bot on request, as well as for the birthday of my dear Lvene.💋

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

I would also like to ask you to stop writing to me asking me to add a male pov and just whine about its absence. It annoys the hell out of me because every single one of my bots says that I DON'T work with male-pov, damn it. Show a little more respect for my work, please. I always play as a girl, and if I see a cool bot with a male-pov, I just ignore it and I'm quietly playing with my female persona instead of throwing tantrums in front of the bot's author.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

࣪ ִֶָ☾. ADDITIONAL .☽ ࣪ ִֶָ
I'd like to remind you that English isn't my native language, so there may be errors in the text that arise when the text is translated through a translator.
To request a bot, you can message me on Telegram: moon_pumpkin1809 or Tamblr. However, please note that I don't work with male-pov or Pierrot. Comments requesting male-pov will be deleted.
Art doesn't belong to me. If you know the author, please include him in the comments so that I can include him in the description.

──── ⋆˖⁺‧₊☽◯☾₊‧⁺˖⋆ ────

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
Happy gameplay, my little monsters.💋

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
